data/maps/EverGrandeCity_PhoebesRoom/tex.EverGrandeCity_PhoebesRoom_Text_IntroSpe:
Ahahaha!\pI'm PHOEBE of the ELITE FOUR.
I did my training on MT. PYRE.\pWhile I trained, I gained the ability
to commune with GHOST-type POKéMON.\pYes, the bond I developed with POKéMON
is extremely tight.\pSo, come on, just try and see if you can
even inflict damage on my POKéMON!
data/maps/EverGrandeCity_PhoebesRoom/tex.EverGrandeCity_PhoebesRoom_Text_PostBatt:
There's a definite bond between you
and your POKéMON, too.\pI didn't recognize it, so it's only
natural that I lost.\pYup, I'd like to see how far your bond
will carry you.\pGo ahead, move on to the next room.
